name: xcom-enhanced-gallery
description: Media viewer and download functionality for X.com

scripts.build:all: npm run build:dev && npm run build:prod:verified
scripts.build:all:preflight: npm run prebuild && npm run build:all
scripts.test:threads: node -e "console.log('🖥️  Vitest 성능 설정 정보:'); const os = require('os'); const cpus = os.cpus().length; console.log('   논리 프로세서:', cpus, '개'); const isCI = !!(process.env.CI || process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS); console.log('   CI 환경:', isCI ? 'Yes' : 'No'); const mode = process.env.VITEST_MODE || 'default'; console.log('   테스트 모드:', mode); const calcThreads = (mode) => { if (mode === 'fix') return 1; if (mode === 'turbo') return Math.min(Math.max(Math.floor(cpus * 0.85), 4), 12); if (isCI) return Math.min(Math.max(cpus - 1, 1), 2); return Math.min(Math.max(Math.floor(cpus * 0.6), 2), 6); }; console.log('   계산된 스레드 수:', calcThreads(mode), '개'); console.log('\n🚀 빠른 테스트 실행: npm run test:turbo'); console.log('🐛 디버깅용 단일 스레드: npm run test:single');"
scripts.test:refactoring: cross-env VITEST_MODE=refactoring VITEST_DISABLE_COVERAGE=1 vitest run test/refactoring
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:turbo
scripts.check:fix: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run test:turbo
scripts.check:coverage: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:optimized
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.deps:graph: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot src | dot -T svg > docs/dependency-graph.svg || dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot src | sfdp -T svg > docs/dependency-graph.svg
scripts.deps:all: npm run deps:json && npm run deps:graph:dot && npm run deps:graph && npm run deps:check
